side_effects.description: major flushing with new batch of BPC-157, previously never experienced symptoms in over 10 years of research. Exact same flushing sensation as previously experienced with CJC

protocol_notes: Research subject with 10+ years of peptide experience. New batch different from previous batches. Vendor indicated possible vasodilation-related response or sensitivity to peptide/bacteriostatic water. Peptides third-party tested (≥99% purity via HPLC and Mass Spectrometry).
